name: Akatsuki from the Slum
description:
Description: Akatsuki is a poor and homeless shipgirl who always struggle to get by in the slums. Every day, she always cries from getting abused and bullied by those around her, with her only friends being Ikazuchi and Satsuki.

Doujin: "Akatsuki from the Slum"

Series: Kantai Collection
creator: Chunter
